ps140: On this day the working of Your Holy Spirit came down upon Your Apostles,* showing them to be supremely wise, and seers of divine things,* filling them with Your blessed teaching.* Wherefore, we glorify Your saving dispensation,* O Jesus Almighty, the Saviour of our souls.

On this day Your Spirit, O All-powerful Lord,* has been sent forth from the Father,* He who is consubstantial with You,* was distributed among the Apostles in the form of fiery tongues;* thus He prepared them to preach Your mighty deeds.* Wherefore we glorify Your saving dispensation,* O Jesus, Almighty, the Saviour of our souls.

On this day, O Saviour, You have poured forth the gifts of Your Comforting Spirit,* granting mortal-mankind to prophesy,* as You once promised, O Word,* whereby You taught all to worship and adore the undivided Trinity.* Wherefore we glorify Your saving dispensation,* O Jesus Almighty, the Saviour of our souls.
Let us sing a hymn of praise to the consubstantial Trinity,* Father, Son, and Holy Spirit;* for this is the command and teaching* of all the Prophets, Apostles, and Martyrs.
aposticha: 1, Podoben “The joy of the heavenly ranks…”

On the mountain, Moses beheld in the fire, He Who Is.* And now the Spirit has come in the form of fire to the wise Apostles, the beholders of God.* Thus clearly enlightening them,* that it is One God who spoke both then and now,* of the same essence.

With fiery tongues God’s rhetoricians,* call all to the waters of divine Baptism;* and with the fire of the Spirit* they burn the babblings of ungodly rhetoricians.* But, O Comforter, come and enlighten us* who faithfully proclaim You as God.

As You consecrated all the fiery bodiless ones,* so with the Spirit’s fire consecrate all* who in material bodies now serve You, O God, who ineffably assumed flesh.* O, how abundantly praised are You,* and how wondrous are You in Your works* O Lover of mankind!
Having Christ God as our Advocate with the Father,* let us bow in worship with faith to the Holy Spirit,* the other Advocate who has come to us on earth today.
aposticha_verses: A pure heart create for me, O God;* put a steadfast spirit within me.
Do not cast me away from Your presence,* nor deprive me of Your Holy Spirit.
